acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.purpose: Acquire JPX official data portal page for provenance and discovery of listed securities dataset.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.allowed_in_v2_13c: HTTP GET raw HTML only, preserve bytes, compute SHA256, record metadata and candidate links.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.prohibited_in_v2_13c: No parsing decision, no normalization, no net-new filtering, no rebuild, no scoring.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/jpx_v2_13c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.purpose: Acquire official catalog entry/search surface where List of TSE-listed Issues is listed as free monthly Excel data.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.allowed_in_v2_13c: HTTP GET raw HTML if accessible, preserve bytes, discover workbook/download links without accepting rows.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.prohibited_in_v2_13c: No browser automation unless explicitly approved, no fragile scraping, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/jpx_v2_13c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.url_or_discovery_rule: Discover only from official JPX data portal/catalog entry. Expected dataset title: List of TSE-listed Issues.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.purpose: Acquire official listed issues file as raw bytes if a direct official download link is discovered in v2.13C.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.allowed_in_v2_13c: Download only direct official workbook/CSV discovered from JPX pages; preserve exact bytes, compute SHA256.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.prohibited_in_v2_13c: No accepted filtering, no normalization, no net-new filtering, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw workbook/CSV exactly as received under raw/jpx_v2_13c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.purpose: Acquire official listed company search page as fallback/provenance if the data portal route is dynamic or blocked.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.allowed_in_v2_13c: HTTP GET raw HTML only, preserve bytes and candidate links.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.prohibited_in_v2_13c: No scraping accepted rows from dynamic search UI, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/jpx_v2_13c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.url_or_discovery_rule: Derived only from official JPX listed issues file during validation.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.purpose: Prevent inclusion of ETFs, REITs, funds, preferred securities, foreign stocks or other non-common-equity instruments without review.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.allowed_in_v2_13c: Record raw files and metadata only.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.prohibited_in_v2_13c: No equity classification decision during acquisition.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.url_or_discovery_rule: Preserve JPX/TSE local security codes exactly as text.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.purpose: Avoid numeric conversion and preserve leading zeros or special suffixes if present.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.allowed_in_v2_13c: Store source file exactly and leave parsing decisions to validation.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.prohibited_in_v2_13c: No conversion of local code to integer.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_13c.raw_preservation_policy: Raw official file remains source of truth.

validation_questions_for_v2_13d.question: Does JPX expose a directly downloadable List of TSE-listed Issues file from official pages?
Is the downloaded file Excel, CSV or another structured format?
Which sheet/table contains the listed securities table?
Does the dataset contain local code, company name, market segment, security type, industry and ISIN?
How many rows exist before filtering?
How many rows are ordinary listed companies versus ETFs, REITs, preferred securities, funds, foreign stocks or other instruments?
How many candidate identifiers are net-new against expanded_universe_v2_12e?
Can JPX rows be normalized conservatively without brittle scraping?
Does JPX materially reduce the 16,842-row gap to 50k?
Should JPX be source provider, candidate provider, enrichment, reference-only or deferred?
